entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The legume crop for which wild species are evaluated for disease resistance

entities.name: WILD CICER SPECIES
entities.description: Seven wild annual species of the Cicer genus evaluated for disease resistance

entities.name: FUSARIUM OXYSPORUM F.SP. CICERIS
entities.description: A fungal pathogen causing wilt in chickpeas

entities.name: SCLEROTIUM ROLFSII
entities.description: A fungal pathogen causing root and stem rot

entities.name: ASCOCHYTA RABIEI
entities.description: A fungal pathogen causing blight in chickpeas

entities.name: BOTRYTIS CINEREA
entities.description: A fungal pathogen causing grey mold

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand or fight off a pathogen

entities.name: STANDARD SCREENING TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Evaluation methods developed at ICRISAT to test for pathogen resistance

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, where screening techniques were developed

entities.name: C. BIJUGUM
entities.description: A wild Cicer species showing resistance to F. oxysporum, A. rabiei, and B. cinerea

entities.name: C. ECHINOSPERMUM
entities.description: A wild Cicer species showing low incidence of F. oxysporum

entities.name: C. JUDAICUM
entities.description: A wild Cicer species showing resistance to A. rabiei

entities.name: C. PINNATIFIDUM
entities.description: A wild Cicer species showing resistance to A. rabiei
